channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Panthers stay active at NHL trade deadline by getting goalie Vitek Vanecek from the Sharks
item.description: The defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers continue to be active in the leadup to the NHL trade deadline. The Panthers acquired goaltender Vitek Vanecek on Wednesday from the San Jose Sharks for 25-year-old forward Patrick Giles, the teams announced.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bengals' Sam Hubbard retires from NFL at 29
item.description: Cincinnati Bengals defensive end Sam Hubbard announced on Wednesday he will retire from the NFL after only seven seasons. He is 29 years old.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls Fest 2025: Team announces dates, registration open for 3v3 tournament
item.description: CHICAGO — Registration is now open for Bulls Fest 2025, which will be held outdoors on the United Center campus from Aug. 23-24, the team announced this week.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: 7 stand trial over cyber death threats against Paris Olympics artistic director
item.description: PARIS (AP) — Seven people have been summoned to appear in court in Paris on Wednesday in connection with cyberbullying targeting the artistic director of last summer's Paris Olympics’ opening and closing ceremonies.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Reports: Bears trade for all-pro Chiefs OL Joe Thuney
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears have reportedly traded for four-time Super Bowl champion guard Joe Thuney from the Chiefs. According to multiple reports, the Bears are sending back a 2026 fourth-round pick for the 32-year-old guard.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James becomes first to score 50,000 combined points in NBA regular season and playoffs
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James is well on his way to rewriting every previous definition of basketball longevity, and the 40-year-old star is now racking up numbers the NBA has never seen before.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 49ers free agency: Position-by-position look at Purdy’s offensive cast
item.description: The 49ers' biggest cost this offseason will be Brock Purdy's contract extension but they still must sort through upcoming free agency expenses.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: A record $100 million donation will give next gen of US Olympians $100K to spend after they retire
item.description: The U.S. Olympic team received its biggest donation ever — $100 million — to fund $100,000 payments and matching life insurance benefits for anyone who earns a spot on Team USA starting next year. The donation to the U.S.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lewis Hamilton's move to Ferrari is having a cultural impact far beyond Formula 1
item.description: Lewis Hamilton’s impact stretches far beyond Formula 1 and his quest to win a record-breaking eighth world title with his new team.
item.dc:creator: James Ellingworth, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Bay Hill broadcast to feature few commercial and more player-caddie chatter
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — The Arnold Palmer Invitational will have fewer commercials and more emphasis on data and player-caddie interactions as part of a pilot program a key sponsor has endorsed.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Officials say 'technical issue' prevented video replay of missed knockdown in Davis-Roach fight
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The New York State Athletic Commission said a “technical issue” prevented officials from seeing replay of Gervonta Davis going to a knee in the ninth round of his fight against Lamont Roach and is reviewing the matter.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 2 USC hopes to build off first conference title in 31 years in Big Ten tournament
item.description: With their first regular season conference championship in 31 years in hand, Southern California will turn its attention to the Big Ten tournament. The second-ranked Trojans know winning that championship will be difficult.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jordan Howlett, of the Fast Foods Secrets Club, returns to Oceanside High School
item.description: You may have seen Oceanside alum Jordan Howlett before while scrolling through your social media feed. Telling his over 25 million viewers on Instagram and TikTok to, "Come here," before he reveals the secret recipes of everyone's fast food favorites as part of his Fast Food Secrets Club.
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: First female NBA scout talks trailblazing for Women's History Month
item.description: Laflin was previuosly a cheerleader for three professional sports teams, had a recurring role in "Baywatch" and worked as a model.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Senate to vote on bill banning trans athletes from women's sports
item.description: The legislation asserts under Title IX protections for female athletes that gender is “recognized based solely on a person’s reproductive biology and genetics at birth.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: New Jersey cools off Utah HC, 3-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The New Jersey Devils scored twice in the third period to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 3-1 at Delta Center on Saturday, ending Utah's three-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Power struggles on 44th birthday as he begins IndyCar season seeking a Penske contract extension
item.description: Will Power had a rough 44th birthday Saturday when he lost power in his car, brushed the wall during practice and had his hybrid engine changed before qualifying for IndyCar’s season-opening race.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Florida Man Games return for Round 2 as teams vie to be the world’s worst superhero
item.description: The Florida Man Games are back for Round 2, as teams from around the state gather to prove they have what it takes to join the ranks of the world’s worst superhero.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Father convicted in shooting of St. Louis youth football coach over son's playing time
item.description: Jurors have convicted a father in the shooting of a St. Louis youth football coach following an apparent dispute over his son's playing time.
item.dc:creator: Joey Schneider, NewsNation

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Tight ends and defensive backs
item.description: At the NFL Scouting Combine, defensive backs and tight ends are going through drills at Lucas Oil Stadium, with prospects like Gunnar Helm, Harold Fannin Jr., Malaki Starks, Sebastian Castro, and Kevin Winston Jr. showcasing their skills and potential to contribute to NFL teams.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Davis beats Herriman to win 6A state title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a battle of the top two 6A boys basketball teams, Davis proved to be the best in the state. Coleman Atwater poured in 24 points, while Bode Sparrow added 16 as the #2 seeded Darts knocked off top-seeded Herriman, 75-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lone Peak wins fourth straight state championship
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The dynasty continues for the Lone Peak girls basketball team. The Knights won their fourth straight state championship Thursday beating Copper Hills for a second straight year, 46-42.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU drains 17 three-pointers in 91-81 win over ASU
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored 26 points, Trevin Knell added 18 and No. 25 BYU beat short-handed Arizona State 91-81 on Wednesday night to extend its winning streak to five games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz lose to Kings on Kessler's big night, 118-101
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Despite a season-high 25 points and 14 points from Walker Kessler, the Utah Jazz lost to the Sacramento Kings Wednesday night at the Delta Center, 118-101. Keegan Murray scored a season-high 26 points and Zach Levine added 22 to lift the hot-shooting Kings.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: GJ Girls Basketball wins opening playoff game, set for battle with #1 seed
item.description: In the first-ever playoff basketball game played at Grand Junction's brand-new gym, the Tigers came out on top.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
